description: Leah Heil Pan hosts Binance's Responsible Trading Summer Camp, focusing on managing and growing crypto portfolios. The session includes expert insights on portfolio diversification, risk management, and legal aspects of crypto trading, including tax implications. Participants can win prizes by completing a quiz after the webinar.
topic_summary: The webinar covers responsible trading strategies, portfolio diversification, and risk management in crypto trading. It emphasizes the importance of understanding diversification and its implications on risk and profit, featuring insights from Darius Sitt, Co Founder at QCP Capital.
